name: Simple Domain Generalization for Strong Pixel-Level Image Tampering Detection in Modern VLMs

description: arXiv:2607.18230v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Modern vision-language models (VLMs) have significantly improved image generation and editing capabilities, making pixel-level image tampering detection increasingly important yet challenging under cross-model and out-of-distribution shifts. This work studies domain generalization for pixel-level image tampering detection in modern VLMs like Cha...
